audits.name: forbidden-vector-icon-imports
audits.description: Ensures runtime UI code only uses the centralized AppIcon wrapper.

audits.name: anti-plain-text-icon
audits.description: Detects fake icon glyphs that bypass the design-system icon pipeline.

audits.name: anti-hardcoded-runtime-endpoints
audits.description: Detects hardcoded runtime network targets outside the approved configuration seam.

audits.name: icon-only-pressable-accessibility
audits.description: Flags icon-only pressables that do not provide an accessibility label.

audits.description: Highlights oversized backend services/controllers for controlled SOLID refactors.
